moments.author: Sam Bankman‑Fried
moments.why: The post, made via a proxy from federal prison, triggered an 11% temporary rally in the FTT token as trading bots responded instantly.

moments.author: Donald Trump
moments.quote: One of the HOTTEST anywhere in the World… HISTORIC $250 MILLION Investment in TRUMP ACCOUNTS… THIS IS THE GOLDEN AGE OF AMERICA!
moments.why: Despite his presidential praise for Micron and its CEO’s political spending, Micron stock plunged over 10% the same day—highlighting limits of such endorsements.

moments.author: Jaylen Brown
moments.why: Sent immediately after a shocking trade, the heartfelt post signaled gratitude to Boston fans and optimism about starting anew in Philadelphia.

moments.author: Darren Watkins Jr. (IShowSpeed)
moments.quote: can’t believe this why does it have to be this way for me 💔
moments.why: The viral streamer’s post about missing a flight to a World Cup match captured public sympathy and media attention around his unexpected appearance at a San Francisco watch party.

moments.author: Fever Updates
moments.quote: Caitlin Clark in attendance for the USA vs. Bosnia…
moments.why: Photos of WNBA star Caitlin Clark at a U.S. World Cup match went viral and sparked debate over whether the images were real or AI-generated.
